suppressed.emotion_id: string | null — emotion that was low but significant
suppressed.label: string | null
suppressed.copy: string | null — e.g. 'You kept the sadness quiet this week'

emotional_arc.arc_type: enum: stable | rising | falling | volatile | masked
emotional_arc.arc_copy: string — 1 line describing the emotional shape of the week e.g. 'Started heavy. Got louder. Stayed complicated.'

copy.headline: string — e.g. 'You listened to heartbreak like it was a sport.'
copy.body: string — 2-3 lines unpacking what the emotional profile means in human terms

color_map.emotion_id: color_token — maps each emotion to a colour
